title: Microhabitat archive richness follow-on phase
summary: Thirty-seventh structured packet for Eco Explorer. This is the active lane-2 microhabitat follow-on: deepen old-growth, under-root, and cave-adjacent microhabitats with narrow science-safe content packs, then add one quiet archive or sketchbook payoff inside existing surfaces.

execution_order.why_now: Lane 2 should now support the new old-growth and cave-adjacent spaces without reopening systems work.

execution_order.goal: Implement the first microhabitat content pack.
execution_order.why_now: This is the narrowest way to make those new spaces feel denser and more teachable.
The pack should stay science-safe and content-owned.

execution_order.goal: Prepare one microhabitat archive and sketchbook payoff.
execution_order.why_now: After the content lands, one quiet memory payoff is the next best lane-2 move.

execution_order.goal: Add a microhabitat archive and sketchbook payoff.
execution_order.why_now: This lets lane 2 leave behind stronger place memory without inventing a new shell.
The archive/sketchbook layer should stay compact and optional.

guardrails: Do not widen route, station, or traversal logic.
Keep the payoff inside existing archive or sketchbook surfaces.
Prefer a few strong microhabitat anchors over broad taxonomy sprawl.
For the active content pack, favor old-growth regeneration and hanging-canopy carriers over another cave-fauna or seep-floor wave.
For the archive follow-on, stay sketchbook-first and do not reopen atlas or station copy unless a note-fit check truly forces it.
acceptance_focus: New microhabitats feel denser and more science-rich.
One compact archive or sketchbook payoff makes them more memorable.
handoff_prompt: Read AGENTS.md, .agents/lane-runner.md, .agents/project-memory.md, .agents/work-queue.md, .agents/lanes/lane-2.md, docs/reports/2026-03-30-microhabitat-archive-richness-follow-on-phase.md, and this packet. Treat this as the active lane-2 microhabitat phase: deepen old-growth and cave-adjacent microhabitats with narrow content packs, then add one quiet archive or sketchbook payoff without reopening route or station systems.
